entries.title: Teach the Future Fellowship Program
entries.summary: The Teach the Future Fellowship (TFF) is a Victorian Department of Education initiative that supports students commencing an eligible undergraduate initial teacher education (ITE) degree in 2026 in areas of workforce shortage.

chapters.title: Overview — $10,000, 2026, TFF, ITE, ATAR, overview
Policy and Guidelines — there, guidance, topic, resources
Resources — TFF, resources, frequently, asked, questions, program

resources.title: Teach the Future FellowshipprogramExternal Link
resources.note: Applicants can apply for the Teach the Future Fellowship (TFF) via the online form available on the Department of Education website: Teach the Future Fellowship program External Link .

resources.title: Victorian School BuildingAuthorityExternal Link
resources.note: Principals, in consultation with the Victorian School Building Authority External Link (VSBA), are responsible for allocating teacher housing.

resources.title: Teacher Housing TenancyAgreementExternal Link
resources.note: To enter a lease, the allocated teacher must complete a Teacher Housing Tenancy Agreement External Link endorsed by the principal and VSBA property manager.

resources.title: Teacher Tenancy Guidelines for Renting a TeacherHouseExternal Link
resources.note: The tenant, principal and Department share responsibility for managing the property. The lease specifies these responsibilities. For more detailed information, refer to the Teacher Housing Property Ma

entries.title: Teacher Registration
entries.summary: The Education and Training Reform Act 2006 requires that all teachers in Victoria obtain registration or permission to teach (PTT) from the Victorian Institute of Teaching (the Institute) before they can be employed in any Victorian school, including Victorian Government schools or an early childhood education setting.

chapters.title: Overview — 2006, PTT, overview, education, training, reform
